headline: Kenyan Baker Breaks Through Collateral Barrier With Women's Program
meta_description: A Kenyan woman entrepreneur found a path to business success when a support program helped her overcome the collateral requirement that blocked traditional len…
summary_short: Locked out of traditional loans due to lack of collateral, a Kenyan woman entrepreneur found breakthrough support through an Africa-wide program for women business owner…
body:
A Kenyan woman entrepreneur who was denied a business loan because she had no collateral found opportunity through a support program designed to help women entrepreneurs across Africa overcome this common barrier.

Without collateral to pledge, many women in the region struggle to access the capital needed to start or expand their ventures. The program recognized this systemic gap and created a pathway for entrepreneurs who might otherwise remain locked out of traditional financing.

Since receiving support, her bakery has grown—evidence that opportunity and access can transform lives. Her success story reflects a broader shift: when financial barriers fall away, women entrepreneurs bring their ideas to market and build thriving businesses that support their families and communities.
quick_facts: Kenyan woman denied loan due to lack of collateral
Program supports women entrepreneurs across Africa
Her bakery has grown since receiving support
